name: mobile-surfaces
description: Expo iOS starter for Live Activities, Dynamic Island, home-screen widgets, and iOS 18 control widgets.
author: Glendon Chin <glendonchin@gmail.com>

scripts.surface:check: node --experimental-strip-types scripts/validate-surface-fixtures.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/build-schema.mjs --check && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/generate-surface-fixtures.mjs --check && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/check-activity-attributes.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/check-validator-sync.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/check-adapter-boundary.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/check-external-pins.mjs && node --test scripts/surface-contracts.test.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/validate-trap-catalog.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/check-trap-error-binding.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/generate-trap-bindings.mjs --check && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/generate-traps-data.mjs --check && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/build-agents-md.mjs --check
scripts.mobile:dev: pnpm --dir apps/mobile exec expo start --host lan
scripts.mobile:dev-client: pnpm --dir apps/mobile exec expo start --dev-client --host lan
scripts.mobile:prebuild:ios: pnpm --dir apps/mobile exec expo prebuild --platform ios --clean
scripts.mobile:build:ios: pnpm --dir apps/mobile exec eas build --platform ios --profile development
scripts.mobile:build:ios:sim: pnpm --dir apps/mobile exec eas build --platform ios --profile development-simulator
scripts.mobile:build:ios:preview: pnpm --dir apps/mobile exec eas build --platform ios --profile preview
